name: R-8 component-add --dry-run reports planned writes without creating any files per §2.14
command: rm -rf src && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/component-add.sh" --name Button --target-dir src/components --dry-run 2>err.txt && [ ! -d src ] && grep -q 'dry_run=true' err.txt && echo skipped 1>&2
